required_evidence: Clear investment thesis and strategic rationale
pass_condition: Rationale clearly stated and supported by facts

required_evidence: IRR, NPV, payback, EV/EBITDA, leverage and DSCR
pass_condition: Key return and valuation metrics disclosed

required_evidence: PPA tariff, merchant exposure, generation, capacity factor, inflation and FX assumptions
Construction, offtaker, regulatory, FX, curtailment, technology and legal risks
Downside case, price curve, capex, opex, FX and delay sensitivities
Comparable multiples, EV/MW, EV/EBITDA and transaction benchmarks
Ownership stake, voting/control rights, minority protections and exit rights
Offtaker, EPC contractor, O&M provider, seller and guarantor credit quality
Permits, land, grid, EPC, COD, contingency and schedule readiness
pass_condition: Readiness evidenced with status and dependencies

required_evidence: E&S risks, permits, land/social impact and mitigation plans
Evidence that prior IC or reviewer comments have been addressed
